title: Tenant
description: Authoritative tenant definition. All other schema documents carry tenantId as a FK to this entity. Stores operational metadata including timezone (for SLA clock calculations) and locale (for display formatting). Suspended tenants cannot ingest new work items or trigger transitions.

id.description: Unique tenant identifier. This is the tenantId referenced as a FK across all other schemas.

code.description: Short uppercase identifier. Used in Prometheus metric labels, Loki MDC context, and Grafana dashboard filters. Max 16 chars, alphanumeric and underscore only. Example: BARCLAYS, ACME_CORP.

contacts.description: Operational contacts. Multiple contacts per role are allowed.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g. Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo). Required for SLA clock calculations. warnAfterMinutes and escalateAfterMinutes in slaRules are measured in business-calendar minutes within this timezone. A work item created at 17:00 London time with a 2-hour SLA warns at 09:00 the next business day, not 19:00 the same day.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale tag (e.g. en-GB, ja-JP). Drives currency symbol placement and date format in the blotter and detail view.

status.description: SUSPENDED: cannot ingest new work items or trigger transitions. DECOMMISSIONED: permanently inactive.

active.description: Mirrors status==ACTIVE for consistent querying pattern across all config documents.
